description: A detailed view of the Paderborn city hall, a grand red-brick building with elaborate Renaissance and Gothic architectural elements including arched arcades at ground level, ornate gables, and decorative stonework. Figures mill about the square in front, some near market stalls. A horse-drawn cart stands at right. A domed church or cathedral is visible in the middle distance beyond the roofline. The sky is partly cloudy, casting warm light across the facade.
